body.title: Redesign /audit-expert to load expert panel from EXPERTS.md
body.result: audit-expert/run: load_experts() + select_experts() from EXPERTS.md; fallback to default 11; SKILL.md step 2 updated; 9 tests pass
body.description:
Redesign /audit-expert skill to load its expert panel from EXPERTS.md at the project root instead of the hardcoded 11-expert list.

**Proposed shape:**
- skills/audit-expert/run: add load_experts(project_root) function that reads EXPERTS.md and returns list of expert dicts
- Fallback: if EXPERTS.md absent, use the existing 11-expert list (backwards compat)
- skills/audit-expert/SKILL.md: update step 2 (select experts) to call python run load <path> instead of the static table
- Weekly/monthly cadence unchanged; random selection draws from the loaded list

**Affected files:** skills/audit-expert/SKILL.md, skills/audit-expert/run (new)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Load + select from EXPERTS.md; expert output format and cadence unchanged
**Test plan:** Unit test load_experts() with fixture EXPERTS.md; test fallback when file absent; test random selection stays within loaded list
